college_info.college_name: Arunodaya University

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023-24 are open to all the courses. Candidates can apply through the website.

May 20, 2020: Applications for Arunodaya University admissions 2020 are now open on the official website.

Arunodaya University was established in 2014 under the Arunachal Pradesh Act No-13 of the Arunachal Pradesh State Government. Located in Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh, it is accredited by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and Directorate of Higher & Technical Education, Itanagar.

This University offers a vast range of degree, diplomas, and certificates courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma-level. Affiliated to Government of Arunachal Pradesh, it has also gained accreditations from the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and Bar Council of India (BCI) for some of its courses offered.

Arunodaya University admission 2020 process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Students can either visit official website i.e. www.arunodayauniversity.ac.in or can submit the admission form at the University campus. Admission to all the courses offered by Arunodaya University is granted basis candidate’s score in previous qualifying exam or performance in entrance test and personal interview conducted by the University.

Note: Details on the University entrance exam can be checked at the official website.

Arunodaya University offers a vast range of UG (BA, BCom, BSc, BCA and BBA), PG (MBA, MCA), diploma, and other certificate courses to students. Given below is the eligibility criteria and duration of some popular Arunodaya University courses:

The campus drive of Arunodaya University placements 2019 was participated by some of the major recruiters namely Aditya Birla, Vodafone, Voltas and Wipro.

Note: The official website of University has no information regarding the placement success rate and salary packages offered to students in recent years.

Check out details on Arunodaya University Placements

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law. To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?
faqs.answer:
Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.
Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

highlights.summary:

These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Not good place to shape your career.

content.Placements: Last year no student has been placed from our college Till date, the highest salary is approximately. 50k to 70k and the lowest salary is 15k to 30k Amazon, HCl, etc. Companies are the top recruiting companies Software trainee, developer or tester, dba, etc. are some of the roles that are offered in our course. the highest package is around 12-13 lac per annum, the average package is around 3.5-5 lac per annum and the lowest package is 1-2 ka per annum. As there is no placement so there is no internship as well.
content.Infrastructure: As of now, our hostel is moreover like PG there is no proper sanitation, as well as management in our hostel. Many of the student are busy in drinking alcohol as well as taking weed. There is no warden in our hostel. No CCTV camera, no Wi-Fi, the condition of washrooms is pathetic, no security of the student stuffs, condition of sports and games is not good. And the quality of food is very bad. Overall condition of our hostel is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am fully dissatisfied with our college.

content.Placements: There are no campus placements in our college as not single a company visit our college for placements. Placements are nil in every branch. Our college doesn't show any interest in campusing, and no one even thinks about placements. I will never suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities which are provided here include a library with an old collection of books. So, the library strictly needs to be updated. There is no Wi-Fi facility. However, the only thing which is good here is the infrastructure of our college, which is high. Buildings are internally well designed and attractive. There are no medical facilities, and the hostel is not well maintained. There are dirty washrooms, and the hostel is fully unhygienic. The food served in the hostel is very bad.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is build really good though it is in the outskirts of the city. the college have a good hostel facility and good mess and canteen. There is a big playground for sports facility too. Overall it has a good library, ground and classrooms.

individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the placements in 2014.

reviews.review_heading: A good college where you can enjoy your college life and studies. Helpful faculty. Bad placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in this college. Wi-Fi is available on the college campus, and also a hostel facility is present here. In all the classrooms, AC is available. Lab qualities are very good, but a few faculty members are not perfect in their subject like how to explain anything to the students. Also, medical facilities are available here. Sports and games are held in this college along with a better canteen than the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, but it has poor management. It is top 5 colleges of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and good labs. Every lab works fine, large ground for sports, every college inside the campus is connected with paved road and a large parking space for bikes and cars. The place is green and clean, and the seats in civil are just like a primary school. In second years of my studies, they ran out of chalk, because they weren't able to afford.

reviews.review_heading: My college facilities are good, but many problems are faced due to college management.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in the campus. The quality of lab is good, but the classroom quality is not good. The cheapest quality of food is available in the canteen. The hostel room is clean and clear, more space in the room and all facilities are available in a hostel room. I face many infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college like light and water facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in north India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also very good. The buildings are very high, and the campus is very attractive by external part. There is a fountain in the middle of the buildings, and also, there is a very attractive infrastructure which shows the useful utilisation of manpower.

reviews.review_heading: I've admired by my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great near about 30-acres of campus around. The library build around in a completely different block so we can have great peace of learning. Our college has a building for pharmacy, chemistry labs and bio-laboratory. There is some sort of a cultivation lab where hybridising is done for many years, even though there are getting successful output. The red building is the heart of our campus where greatest mind creates history by knowing their extraordinary talents and skills,...

reviews.review_heading: Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges is good for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in my college. Our classrooms are fully air-conditioned and marble-floored. The experimental labs are in very good quality such as there is every machine available for experiments. Our library is also air-conditioned and there is very silent to read in. In our college, sports and games were held at the time of the annual function named "DISHA".

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfactory experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very average. The college was located in the village side area surrounded by fields on all the side. There were problems faced while commuting to and fro and during the rainy season, the conditions were even worse. So overall, I had a bad experience.

reviews.review_heading: Downfall of this college since they made the experienced teachers go out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good and the building is very good looking. The classrooms are well furnished. You might get ac in your first year but after that, you'll only see it but won't get to have its air. The labs are good but you will never get a chance to go to computer labs as almost all the times they are conducting online exams there to earn money.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA)(General) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Doon Business School - Never take admission here for any course other than MBA.

content.Placements: Frankly speaking, it's 0, not a single company visits for BCA students, and all the claims of 100% placement are fake. They just don't provide any placement support, and there is no functioning placement cell. It's just for name sake.
content.Infrastructure: The BCA department doesn't have a permanent classroom, you will just roam from one building to another during your course because you don't have a fixed classroom. The labs are worse than ever, it's worse than the school lab, where there is no access to advanced software. They will just give you a basic system.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is not bad, but I think they are enrolling so many students that it will become difficult.

content.Placements: The placements are decent, with an average percentage of students placed, especially in marketing roles with decent packages from top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are quite average. I think they could do better without some unnecessary rules and regulations. Classrooms are good, but the food in the mess needs some improvement. The sports ground needs to be inside the college so that day boarding students can also use it. Infrastructure is average. The library could be better and needs to improve in some facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and placement opportunities.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students get placements at our college in MBA. The highest package offered for our course was 16 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 4 LPA. The average package offered at our college was 6 LPA. Top recruiters included Black Rock, Oxane, NIIT Limited, etc. The top roles offered were Human Resources, Recruiter, Analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-developed and furnished infrastructure. There were all kinds of facilities available in our department. The labs and classrooms of the college were spacious and air-conditioned. The college hostel was also large in size. The college has Wi-Fi connectivity for each department.

admission_process.title: Doon Global University: Admission Office Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Doon Global University: Admission Office admissionis a blend of merit and entrance basis depending on the programme. The university offers a wide range of courses across fields, such as Management, Commerce, Liberal Studies, Engineering, DPharma, and more. Students need to satisfy the eligibility criteria of the course before applying for the same. The university may accept several national entrance tests, such as CAT/ MAT. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility criteria, and other admission-related information forDoon Global University: Admission Office.

Doon Global University: Admission Office course admissionis subject to clearing of the preset admission criteria. Students need to clear the minimum admission criteria of the desired programme. For UG courses, students need to pass Class 12, whereas, PG admissions are done based on graduation scores. Candidates may have to appear for the university-level entrance test if deemed necessary. Students can check out the following table to know all about the eligibility & selection criteria for popularDoon Global University-Admission Office courses:

The admission process for the Doon Global University-Admission Office includes multiple steps, such as the application process, followed by selection and admission confirmation. Students need to meet the predecided criteria before applying. Candidates can follow the steps explained below to complete the admission process of the university:
Step 1: Application Process
Interested students can apply for the desired programme by filling out the application form available on the university's official website.
Step 2: Selection Process

The university shortlists candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. In some cases, valid entrance exam scores are also needed. Further, students need to appear for the online interview conducted by the university for final selection.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Those who make it to the final merit list need to go through document verification and payDoon Global University: Admission Office feesfor seat confirmation.

reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students, even in the library. Only faculty members can use this. The library is good. The labs are very bad. Their are 3 canteens, and two of them are always close. In sports, their is a small group. Classrooms are not good at all. No sports sreas.

reviews.review_heading: Summary for my college journey.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was pretty good. Various types of facilities were offered to the students. The college has 2 libraries on the campus. Multiple sports facilities were given to the students. The quality of hostel facilities was good. The college canteen and hostel mess were good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-developed and furnished infrastructure. There were all kinds of facilities available in our department. The labs and classrooms of the college were spacious and air-conditioned. The college hostel was also large in size. The college has Wi-Fi connectivity for each department.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The campus has maintained a proper decorum among students. Our college has a good environment for studying. Our college has two libraries and two canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Doon Business School is a good B-school with less fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus is small, but it's lovely. Our college is one of the good B-schools in Uttarakhand. The college is situated far from the city, in a place named Selaqui which is 25 Km far from the city Dehradun. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Different buildings are allocated for the students of UG and PG.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities, placements and activities are conducted on the campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and well furnished. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, medical facilities, library, sports and games. Quality of labs and classrooms are good. Quality of food served in the college canteen is good. Hostel rooms are good and satisfied. I did not face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

review_summary.college_name: Providence College of Engineering - PCE Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good placements are available here.

content.Placements: This college has a very good placement percentage. Around 75% of the students got on-campus placement, and many are trying for off-campus placements. Big companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and Google come here for placement. The highest package was 40 lakhs per year, and the average package is 8-9 lakhs per year. Many students have started their own startups after doing MBA.
content.Infrastructure: The environment is clean, and the campus is large. The college provides free internet in every department, and the central library is open to all. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, and the hostel service is good and affordable. The college holds an annual program on campus, and there are places to play basketball and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Unforgettable memories of the college.

content.Placements: About placement, they are good. Everyone comes to college to get placed in a good company. The placement process starts from the 3rd semester. First, we have placement training sessions in which mock interviews and aptitude sessions are conducted. BCG is the top company to recruit students from our college. Here, the average package is 5.2 LPA, but we have seen a decline in placement percentages over the last few years. Approximately 65% of students were placed on campus, while some tried for off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is really beautiful. Fest names like Resam and Teach Fest, along with other cultural fests, are celebrated every year. The college has a vast library facility occupying an entire compartment of the building with all academic and general books. Classrooms are wide and smart, with an intake of 70 students. Many sporting events are conducted by the college, with basketball and football being the most famous. The boys' and girls' hostels (fees: 65K) are both on campus. Girls have very restricted access; without a gate pass, they cannot leave the hostel and must return within restricted times.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and nice appearance.

content.Placements: Maybe 50% of students were placed in our course. I don't know about the highest, the lowest and the average packages offered in our course clearly. The top recruiting companies for our course are Microsoft, Oracle etc. More than 50% of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are very useful. Our college has good infrastructure so that parents and students will get attracted to it. Especially the washrooms are always neat and tidy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Almost the college is going good.

content.Placements: Almost the college promote the students for campus placements. They train their students from first year. The faculty members provided in the college is best they interact with us. As now the college does't complete the fourth year after that I know about the placement facilities available. But the college work hard for these college placements.
content.Infrastructure: Good in infrastructure due to the college in the middle like a island. The one and only problem is the each class consist of two camera and also it has been viewed from chairperson upto principal. Although I visited soman colleges but this college has good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best in Best but Choose Wisely Before Selecting

content.Placements: Students with the best CGPA have a higher chance of getting placed, as showcasing their skills during interviews significantly increases their placement opportunities. More than 50 percent of students could get placed with starting packages around 25k and going up to 25 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided is excellent, with top-notch lab facilities, classrooms, and a supportive environment. The college offers the best mess facilities and encourages participation in sports and arts.
content.Faculty: The staff and tutors are very supportive and well-qualified. The teaching quality is good, and the curriculum is relevant, preparing students well for the industry. However, the semester exams are quite challenging and serve to measure our education effectively.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of students got placed in the year. We have a separate placement cell on campus that provides proper guidance. Our college arranges a trading session every year which is compulsory to attend. The sessions are on placements and how to face interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing. There is Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are available for every subject. There is a library and a reading room separately. Canteen is very hygienic and provides very hygienic food and also tasty. We do have a sports room and sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college authorities paid a lot of attention to the students, and they had teaching experience.

content.Placements: The placement of the college was good. The college authorities paid a lot of attention to placements. The highest package was 15 lakhs, and many companies came for placements. Internships were also easily available, and top companies like Bosch visited the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus was good, and it had everything, including a library, labs, canteen, ground, workshop, and much more. I never thought of bunking in my college, as it was such a great place. The college also offered many courses, such as Diploma, engineering, school, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Great college, good environment, infrastructure.

content.Placements: The students placed from my course were 35-40, on campus and others from off-campus placement. The highest package was around 6 LPA. Everyone from my course got internships. There was Sumago Infotech who offered internships. The courses offered are Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Data Science.
content.Infrastructure: Every floor has Wi-Fi, and every floor has labs as per their requirements and as per their course. The library is well-maintained and cleanliness is great. It has a great turf with great maintenance to provide students with great ground and amenities. The canteen food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college overall but it definitely needs a lot of improvement.

content.Placements: Placement for mechanical engineering students is just above average. This is because many students choose off-campus placements. But around 80 to 85 percent of students who choose campus placements get placed. Well-known companies keep approaching, but the package is also quite average at about 6 lakh to 10 lakh per annum on average. Top roles consist of on-field managers to department heads. Overall the rating can be considered above average.
content.Infrastructure: Guru Gobind Singh College of Engineering and Research Centre offers a very great quality and type of infrastructure. Anything that students demand with unity is made available in a few months or sometimes even weeks. It can be basic lab materials or even a whole lab setup. There is a lab for every single subject that is in the 4-year syllabus, and also the labs are very updated. One great fact is that the whole college is kept so clean. Every class, lab, floor, and campus is always kept clean by the maintenance team.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is good and in good condition. Each student can access all these facilities without any interruption. The college offers it very well.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing staff, beautiful campus, campus is always clean, and teaching is also very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing. There is Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are available for every subject. There is a library and a reading room separately. Canteen is very hygienic and provides very hygienic food and also tasty. We do have a sports room and sports activities.

It has a great turf with great maintenance to provide students with great ground and amenities. The canteen food is also good.

Every class, lab, floor, and campus is always kept clean by...

reviews.review_heading: College experience with its infrastructure and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Each department has its own Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-maintained. The quality of the food in the canteen is very hygienic and good enough. Sports and games are not held properly, and no support is given for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Value for Money and Nice College.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and a nice environment for study. The food quality of the mess and canteen is also good. There is a huge ground to play cricket, football, and a separate basketball court is also available. The college campus is rich with greenery. In the college campus, there is also a Gurdwara. The college campus includes certain projects like a solar power plant.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommend. Guru Gobind Singh College provides a great curriculum, academics, and environment.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very well-maintained. They are in a very good condition. Each department is provided with Wi-Fi. The library is very beneficial for students. The quality of food provided in the canteen is very good. The focus on sports is less.

reviews.review_heading: College of dreams. Best!
reviews.review_text: GGSF has a huge campus with well-equipped laboratories. GGSF has a very good library having a digital library with Wi-Fi and computers, having all types of technical and GK books. GGSF has spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with projectors for smart learning.

reviews.review_heading: New building for more courses. They have build new building for MBA so you can join if you want.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite classy but there is always room for improvement which I think they should do. First of all, they need to change mess services. All classrooms must have Wi-Fi facilities with very high connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty and best campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best; there is a strict dress code for both students and faculty, and Wi-Fi is available at the 3rd floor library with a variety of books. Our college does not have a hostel, so I stayed in an outside room with me and three other shared rooms with all the essential facilities, healthy mess food and a breakfast salad meal. Sports events are held once a semester.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Laboratories are well-maintained. They conduct sports events. The hostel facility is not available in our college. Students have to live in rental rooms outside.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but I am not satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi facilities on the 3rd floor. The food in the canteen is not good. The library is good. Classrooms are good, but they are small and lack air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs improvements as soon as poosible.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is more than adequate for every student's needs, and Wi-Fi is available on each floor. Our library is well-equipped. The labs are decent. The quality of food served is average in the hostel, and the medical facilities are excellent with the prompt response. Sports equipment is \available for all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average infrastructure and facilities, but negligible placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college building is pretty average. Wi-Fi connection is slow, and labs have limited equipment /or instruments. Classrooms are very basic with computers and there is a projector only in seminar halls. The library has some course-related books but there, not many books for general reading. Journals and newsletters are also in limited numbers. The college canteen has basic dishes on the menu, but the taste is good. I'm not aware of medical facilities but they do have a basketb...

faqs.answer:
A:    Matrusri Institute Of PG Studies has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed a Bachelor Degree of minimum 3 years duration (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech. / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages) with 50% marks (45% marks for SC and ST categories).
The qualifying Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program/Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per
UGC Regulations of 2013.
Candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 03rd April,  2002). No maximum age limit.

highlights.summary:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Marian Academy of Management Studies admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Marian Academy of Management Studies admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

Founded in 2010, Marian Academy of Management Studies is a private institute. It is located in Ernakulum, Kerala. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Marian Academy of Management Studies provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 6 courses across specialisations such as IT & Systems and Supply Chain. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, MCA, BCA and BBA. Marian Academy of Management Studies fees ranges between INR 1,80,000 to 2,90,000. The student intake for these courses is 120. Marian Academy of Management Studies offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Marian Academy of Management Studies offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has above-average faculty members, placements, and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Bachelor of computer application is the best course and it has wide opportunities. Many of the students from our college got placed in Infosys, Stem, Technopark, IBM, etc. Our college conducts interviews with many companies for skilled students. Our college provides red-hate certification for cloud computing students. Artificial intelligence and cyber security are also provided in our college. Skilled students will surely get the placement. Skills matter in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the best computer labs. There are 3 labs available there. Labs with AC and best computers. Our campus has free Wi-Fi with a good range. We have spacious classrooms with blackboards, whiteboards, and projectors. And also have cameras for watching by higher authorities. We have a calm and pace library for referring our studies-related text books and other books. The hostel facility is good with average food. We have sports supporting campus. They conduct matches.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Never take admission in this college, otherwise your life will be spoiled.

review_content.Placements: This college does not provide even 1% of the placement assistance. Please stay away from this college to make your life brighter. You have to search by your own and end up getting 10k or even less than that outside. Because we all are suffering. Don't look at this college's website it is full fake. Fake promises were being made.
review_content.Infrastructure: No facility. Water facility is not there. Rubbish college, no facility. You cannot do anything except sitting in the college. Only a canteen is there on the top floor with no good dishes. The owner of the college has eaten the money of children and enjoying.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It gives good placement, internship, and hospital duty and also lab facility in nursing department.

review_content.Placements: The placement of my college is very bad as there is no placement facility in our college. Only 10% of the students of our seniors got good placement and also there is no internship facility in the nursing department. But, in the other department, the internship facility is medium. I don't know exactly how much salary the college offered, but they charge a high fee at the admission time for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The B.Sc department lab is very good, but the nursing department lab is very poor. The library facility is also very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the college campus, no sports facilities and also the college campus is very small. A very worst food is available in the college canteen. The girls' hostel facility is also very good, but there is no boys hostel. The college takes rental rooms and provides for boys, and the classrooms are good.

review_summary.college_name: St. George College of Management, Science and Nursing Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very nice academic classes and practical.

content.Placements: B.Sc. nursing course starting from 9 Lakhs. Internship and posting in different multi-specialty hospitals. Most students get placed from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college are well-furnished. Wi-Fi facility is available. Classrooms are hitech and projector attached. Labs are well-maintained by the management. Hygienic toilets are available in our college for both girls and boys. A first aid kit is available for emergency situations. They provide good facilities in both colleges and hostels. Proper lab facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to start your bright career.

content.Placements: I got placement in IIHT, and later I shifted to big MNC like Capgemini. Our college placement officer in 2017 was very good. I was selected in an interview, and I had good grades as well. Also, you need to score good marks in all the subjects, and spoken English should also be good. Students can also ask the help of teachers as I did the same, and all the faculty members were happy to help me. Likewise, I become good in spoken as well as it boosts my confidence.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has everything, including sanitised canteen, washrooms and separate playground. Library ma'am is a bit strict, and sometimes she won't allow us to talk inside. Wi-Fi is free. BBM classes have a monitor and a projector. The playground is a bit far from the college, but everything is near the college, including a metro station.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Never take admission in this college, otherwise your life will be spoiled.

content.Placements: This college does not provide even 1% of the placement assistance. Please stay away from this college to make your life brighter. You have to search by your own and end up getting 10k or even less than that outside. Because we all are suffering. Don't look at this college's website it is full fake. Fake promises were being made.
content.Infrastructure: No facility. Water facility is not there. Rubbish college, no facility. You cannot do anything except sitting in the college. Only a canteen is there on the top floor with no good dishes. The owner of the college has eaten the money of children and enjoying.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It gives good placement, internship, and hospital duty and also lab facility in nursing department.

content.Placements: The placement of my college is very bad as there is no placement facility in our college. Only 10% of the students of our seniors got good placement and also there is no internship facility in the nursing department. But, in the other department, the internship facility is medium. I don't know exactly how much salary the college offered, but they charge a high fee at the admission time for the students.
content.Infrastructure: The B.Sc department lab is very good, but the nursing department lab is very poor. The library facility is also very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the college campus, no sports facilities and also the college campus is very small. A very worst food is available in the college canteen. The girls' hostel facility is also very good, but there is no boys hostel. The college takes rental rooms and provides for boys, and the classrooms are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the things were satisfying.

content.Placements: There was no placement facility for the bachelor students. Not sure about the MBA students though. I don't think our senior batch have placed anywhere. So, there is no placement, and there is no way of getting salary and stipend. And the roles are not offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, when compared to the other colleges it was poor. The classrooms were decent enough. The library was also good, and there ware no sports facilities. The computer labs and the science labs were decent. The hostel facility was not available; one has to rent a room for staying.

The AP ICET 2026 registration portal will now remain open for the IMU - IMU Vizag Indian Maritime University admission to the MBA/PGDM course till Mar 17, 2026, without a late fee. The exam for the same is scheduled to take place on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: It’s really good because it is apprenticeship-embedded

review_content.Placements: If we are talking about the placements, it is pretty good, but the CTC is not up to the mark. 100% of the people got internships, and after that, placement was also 100%, but only a few companies came for placement like OM Logistics and other logistical companies. They offer roles like warehouse executive, operations executive, logistics coordinator, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty well. We have one basketball court and a badminton court. Other than that, Wi-Fi and fully digital classrooms are available. Talking about the mess food, I will say it’s okay, and you can’t expect too much, but it’s nice comparatively.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Decent and affordable option to study Naval Architecture.

review_content.Placements: Really hardworking placement. Though it's an exclusive industry, the placement cell tries their best to get the student placed. Ship design firms are the primary recruiters. Consider yourself blessed if classification societies and big shipyards show up.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is really cozy and comfortable. Clean and decent ambience. Calm and serene environment for students to study. Mess food is delectable for a university. Free Wi-Fi is available. The campus gets extremely hot in summers and extremely cold in winters.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing environment for those who are interested in academics.

review_content.Placements: I have enrolled in a B.Teach in Naval Architecture and Shipbuilding. My batch strength is 50 students; however, there is another batch of Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering with 50 students. The first-year batch consists of 100 students, 50 in shipbuilding and 50 in ocean engineering. Most of the students get internships in firms like Vedam located in Mumbai or different shipyards in the third year of their course. We have a placement record of 95 percent as of this year, and some students opted for higher studies, and a few were not interested in sitting for the placements. Top recruiting companies include the IRS (Indian Register of Shipping), located in Mumbai, and L&T, which is located in 3 different states. According to requirements, students are placed in different sections. The top role that is offered after graduation is that of surveyor in the IRS itself.

review_summary.college_name: IMU - IMU Vizag Indian Maritime University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Apprenticeship Embedded (BBA) in Maritime Logistics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good experience.

content.Placements: Everyone in our class got selected by good companies. Even though colleges could try to get top companies, they are bringing just decent companies. But after every batch, this apprenticeship opportunity is getting better.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are fully ventilated. But the hostel and mess are not good. Many people got typhoid last semester. The buildings are still under some construction and soon they will be finished. The third floor of the campus is also being renovated so more students can be enrolled.

individual_reviews.course: Apprenticeship Embedded (BBA) in Maritime Logistics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The new style of education with IMU Visakhapatnam.

content.Placements: In Indian Maritime University, Visakhapatnam, I'm studying BBA logistics, and it is an apprenticeship-based course. The total there are 6 semesters (3 years). The first 4 semesters are class programs only, and the last year is an apprenticeship. The highlight of these courses is that they are core-based courses. And for completing these courses, we get a package of 3.20 LPA. It is a LSC (logistics skill council) like course. Therefore, all companies that are listed under these courses will also be available for the placement time. The college is providing 100% placement.

individual_reviews.course: Apprenticeship Embedded (BBA) in Maritime Logistics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It’s really good because it is apprenticeship-embedded

content.Placements: If we are talking about the placements, it is pretty good, but the CTC is not up to the mark. 100% of the people got internships, and after that, placement was also 100%, but only a few companies came for placement like OM Logistics and other logistical companies. They offer roles like warehouse executive, operations executive, logistics coordinator, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty well. We have one basketball court and a badminton court. Other than that, Wi-Fi and fully digital classrooms are available. Talking about the mess food, I will say it’s okay, and you can’t expect too much, but it’s nice comparatively.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Decent and affordable option to study Naval Architecture.

content.Placements: Really hardworking placement. Though it's an exclusive industry, the placement cell tries their best to get the student placed. Ship design firms are the primary recruiters. Consider yourself blessed if classification societies and big shipyards show up.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is really cozy and comfortable. Clean and decent ambience. Calm and serene environment for students to study. Mess food is delectable for a university. Free Wi-Fi is available. The campus gets extremely hot in summers and extremely cold in winters.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amazing environment for those who are interested in academics.

content.Placements: I have enrolled in a B.Teach in Naval Architecture and Shipbuilding. My batch strength is 50 students; however, there is another batch of Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering with 50 students. The first-year batch consists of 100 students, 50 in shipbuilding and 50 in ocean engineering. Most of the students get internships in firms like Vedam located in Mumbai or different shipyards in the third year of their course. We have a placement record of 95 percent as of this year, and some students opted for higher studies, and a few were not interested in sitting for the placements. Top recruiting companies include the IRS (Indian Register of Shipping), located in Mumbai, and L&T, which is located in 3 different states. According to requirements, students are placed in different sections. The top role that is offered after graduation is that of surveyor in the IRS itself.

The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

placements.overview: UBS - Universal Business School- Executive Education, also known as UBS, is a private institute located in Mumbai, Maharashtra and was established in 2009. The total specialisations offered at the institute include Finance, Human Resources, International Business, IT & Systems, Operations, Project Management, Sales & Marketing. UBS offers 13 courses, including MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and BBA. These Degree and Diploma courses are offered across multiple streams, namely Business & Management Studies. The total course fee at this institute ranges between INR 1,98,000-22,32,000 and the courses are approved by AICTE. The institute offers UG and PG courses in Full Time and Part Time mode. UBS offers INR 10,42,000 as the average median salary to students.

college_info.college_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences

highlights.summary:
Situated in Indore, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences (BRAUSS) is a state university which was established in 2016 by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. It is recognised as the first ‘University of Social Sciences’ in the country and has gained approval from the University Grants Commission (UGC) and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

It offers five courses at UG, PG and doctoral level in the field of Arts & Humanities, Business & Social Sciences, Language & Cultural, Medicine & Health, Engineering, Science & Technology, among others. These courses are offered and managed by five schools that are an integral part of this University. These include School of Dr. Ambedkar's Thoughts & Philosophy, School of Social Sciences & Management Studies, School of Agriculture and Rural Development, School of Education and Skill Development and School of Law & Social Justice.

The procedure to apply for BRAUSS admission 2021 is conducted in both online as well as offline modes. Candidates seeking admissions to various programmes offered by Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences must qualify certain criteria as detailed below:

Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences offers in total of five courses at UG, PG and doctoral level. These include a three-year BA programme at UG level along with two-year MSc and MA (in 22 streams) programmes at PG level. It also offers two-year MPhil course in 12 specialisations and PhD course across 17 specialisations at research level.

Key specialisations covered across all courses include Arts & Humanities, Business & Social Sciences, Language & Cultural, Medicine & Health, Engineering and Science & Technology. The table below presents some of the popular BRAUSS courses along with their eligibility criteria and fee structure:

BRAUSS scholarships are offered to both academically-bright and economically-weak students. The scholarships are disbursed under the name of Award of Fellowship and Scholarship and Chancellor’s Fellowships.

Note: Check out the University website for more information on scholarships offered and their respective eligibility criteria.

reviews_list.review_title: Our university provides good facilities and education at very low fees.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is very low at our university.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is very good and clean with separate buildings for every course. Hostel facility is available in our university which is calm and noise free. Sports and various programs are held in our university. Many VIPs are invited to our university.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our university are very helpful, guide students, and qualified with Ph.D. The course curriculum is relevant and makes students industry-ready but does not have practicals. Exams are not tough. Bright students can easily score good marks and an average student can easily pass. The pass SGPA is 5.

faqs.answer: Students with an artistic background have a wide range of professional alternatives. While performing arts provide options in acting, dancing, directing, and producing, visual arts and design offer pathways like graphic design, illustration, and art direction. Digital marketing experts, social media managers, and content producers are common positions in the field of digital media and communication.Options for authorship, content development, and journalism are presented by writing and journalism. Furthermore, curators of galleries or museums are included in the field of arts administration. An arts degree's adaptability enables people to work in a variety of sectors, bringing creativity and critical thinking to disciplines like media and entertainment, design, and administration.Read more about - ⁠BPA Course
faqs.question: Q: What are the best career options in arts?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is very low at our university.

college_info.college_name: Dairy Science College, Bangalore: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Dairy Science College, Bangalore is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.Sc, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Dairy Science College, Bangalore are Dairy Technology, Dairy Science, Veterinary Science, Agriculture & Food Business.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Dairy Science College, Bangalore?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent college with 100% placement and cool environment.

review_content.Placements: 100% placements for all the students in government and private sectors which deal with dairy and food processing companies like ITC, Parle, Britannia, Semaga, Trimuala Foods, Heritage Foods. Students are also placed in Karnataka Milk Federation Units and in all union dairies like Kolar, Bangalore, Mumbai, Tumkur and also in all chilling centres in Karnataka.
review_content.Infrastructure: Pleasant environment with a number of trees. The college is in the centre of the silicon city with all facilities at one point including bank, post office, dispensary, a very big play ground, gym, tennis court, etc. The college also has a good library and an international hostel for NRI students. The canteen provides awesome food for the students prepared in a hygienic condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are around 190 to 200 students from the first to fourth years in the Bachelor of Technology (Dairy Technology). 2 to 3 companies visit with offers, and the college gives opportunities to many students in the top companies. Many students are working out of the country, and are also in good positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: College also has clean and very good labs, a library, and classrooms. Our hostel also provides good, healthy, and nutritious food. College also provides cultural activities and games, both indoors and outdoors.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching faculty members of our college are very good, experienced, with a nice way of teaching, which is very helpful to us. They are very responsive and also help to develop our personality and good character. This course also has a good and relevant curriculum.

Dairy Science College, Bangalore course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. college_info.intro: SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology provides MBA, BTech/ BE in nine specialisations, and ME in two specialisations. For admission to these courses, candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria for the MBA course is that the candidate should have passed a Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with at least 50 % (45 % in case of candidates belonging to reserved category- BC/BCM/MBC/SCA/SC/ST) from a recognized university. The details regarding the SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology popular programmes are mentioned below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology course fee ranges between INR 2,50,000 to 7,76,000.

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology offers MTech courses for two years. The overall seat intake for MTech is 24. The seats are divided into two specialisations. faqs.question: How much percentage is required for MTech at SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    There are a total of 60 seats for the MBA programme of SRMMCET. Candidates are admitted as per the selection criteria prescribed by the college. The seats are further distributed equally in two categories: General Quota (50%) and Management Quota (50%). Furthermore, the college/sanctioning body reserves the right to revise the seat count in any admission year.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for an MBA at SRM Madurai College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates applying for MBA at SRM Madurai College of Engineering and Technology need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000. Only after the fee payment, an application gets submitted successfully. The fee payment can be done in online mode via credit card/debit card/net banking. It is further advisable that the candidates keep the fee payment receipt safe for future references.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty members, decent placements, and active campus life.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students got placed. The highest salary is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and average salary is 5.8 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Zoho, and Accenture. About 70% of students got internships at Zoho, TCS iON, and startups. Top roles offered are software developer, data analyst, QA tester, and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Department facilities include smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, updated labs, and library access. Hostel has clean rooms with Wi-Fi, 24X7 water, and power. It has decent mess and canteen with veg/non-veg options. We have on-campus medical center with doctor support. We have grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: SRM MCET 1st batch vibes, strong labs, supportive staff and early placement support.

review_content.Placements: I'm doing my undergraduate at SRM Madurai College of Engineering and Technology and so far, it's a fantastic learning experience. Placement training begins in the 3rd year and the college makes sure we are well prepared for our professional lives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a compact infrastructure but a vibrant and energetic atmosphere that everyone loves to feel. Hostel food is said to be average, but rooms are generally clean and decent, offering a comfortable stay for students throughout their academic life here.

content.Placements: First of all, we are the first batch of students, so we have to be placed first, then only we can have a review for it. individual_reviews.title: It is the best university.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. Students are eligible for placements in their 4h year. MNCs visit our college to recruit students. They offer good salary packages. The salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 19 LPA. Almost all students got placed in our course. Top recruiting companies are Google, Deloitte, Bajaj, and Nielsen. Students who score a 7 CGPA are eligible for internships. Our college is worth the money paid.

paragraphs: SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technologyadmission 2024is ongoing. The institute offersone UG courseandtwo PG courses,such asBTech, MTech, and MBA. Admission to all the courses isentrance-based.Candidates seeking admission toSRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technologymust register for entrance exams and appear for the same. To know the latest information related toSRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology admission 2024,go through the below sections:

SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology admission 2024is open. The institute carries out anonline modeofapplicationfor all the courses. The institute offersBTech, MBA, and MTechat the UG and PG levels. Admission toBTechis based onTNEA counsellingand forMTech,institutes acceptTANCET score. Additionally, MBA admission is subject to a valid score in one amongCAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAT, GMAT, State Common Entrance Test, and any Central Government organised entrance test. SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology carries out an online mode of application. Further, BTech candidates need to apply first on the official website of TNEA to fill out theTNEA counselling application from 2024.
Step 2: SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology Selection Round

SRM Madurai College for Engineering and Technology admission is based on the entrance exam for all the courses. Further, for MBA the institutes accepts scores of various entrance exams, such as CAT,XAT, CMAT,ATMA, MAT,GMAT, and State Common Entrance Test.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is also available, but there is no network signal in the area. Food quality is poor, and there is no ground. But still, they support the players. The canteen food is not proper and not worth the money, and it's a small place, so it feels not enough.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty members, decent placements, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities include smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, updated labs, and library access. Hostel has clean rooms with Wi-Fi, 24X7 water, and power. It has decent mess and canteen with veg/non-veg options. We have on-campus medical center with doctor support. We have grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: SRM MCET 1st batch vibes, strong labs, supportive staff and early placement support.
reviews.review_text: The college has a compact infrastructure but a vibrant and energetic atmosphere that everyone loves to feel. Hostel food is said to be average, but rooms are generally clean and decent, offering a comfortable stay for students throughout their academic life here.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel is good. The food served in the mess is not good. Wi-Fi is available in our hostel. Our college has a library.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Programme in Development Management (PDM) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for the development sector.

review_content.Placements: DMI has hundred percent placement records since its first batch. Last year, the average placement was 4.2 lakhs, but this year, the average placement will be much higher. For this year, the maximum placement is 7.2 lakhs in Technoserve. Companies like Delhi Commission For Women, Reliance Foundation, Jeevika, COMFED, AKRSP, FES, CEE came for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: DMI has a very well equipped computer lab, high-speed Wi-Fi is available all around the campus. This college has a very rich library with the subscription of many newspapers, journals and articles. This college has a classroom with all the latest facilities. No sports and games are conducted here.

individual_reviews.title: Review of DMI - Development Management Institute.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are more than 100% for all the 3 batches. The highest salary package offered was 8.2 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. Companies like AKRSPI, Srijan, TechnoServe, Samasta, Saathi, etc., and sectors ranges from NGOs, cooperatives to banks and microfinance visit our college for placements. Internships provided by the college are very efficient. Almost 100% of the students get an internship here. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 10,000 per month and the lowest stipend offered was Rs. 5,000 per month. The focus of the whole course is towards practical and field learning. So internships have great importance here.

admission_process.title: DMI Patna Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DMI Patna admission 2025is ongoing. The Development Management Institute (DMI) Patna offers a two-year, full-time PGDM course. Admission to the DMI courses is entrance-based. For admission to the flagship PGDM 2025 batch, the institute accepts valid scores in CAT/XAT/GMAT/CMAT/MAT. To apply forDMI course admissions, the aspirants need to visit the official website or admissions portal of theDevelopment Management Institute, Patna. Candidates seeking admission to the 2025 batch of PGDM courses must meet theDMI admission criteria.
DMI offer PGDM in one specialisation:Development Management. The key highlights ofDMI admission 2025are mentioned in the below table:
Admission Brochure 2024-26
The table below showcases theDMI Patna courseeligibility and selection details for the 2025 session:
Graduation or equivalent in relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) from a recognised University. Additionally, final-year students are also eligible to apply.

For theDMI PGDM admission, candidates with a valid CAT 2023/XAT 2025/GMAT/CMAT 2025/MAT score that matches the cutoff for admission at the Development Management Institute get a seat. Hence, for this flagship course, students need to complete the application process of any of the aforementioned national-level entrance tests, take the test and fill out the separate application form on the DMI official website. Further, the DMI Patna admission criteria are explained below:STEP 1: DMI Application Process 2025The DMI application process is carried out in online mode. For PGDM admission, after the online registration, candidates shall pay the required application fee to confirm their submission and save the application form for future reference.STEP 2: DMI Selection Process 2025Candidates shortlisted on merit in the national level entrance test and academic merit have to take the GDPI round. Further, a commutative score is calculated for final selections. The selection criteria along with the weightage are mentioned in the following table:

STEP 3: DMI Final Merit ListFollowing the conclusion of all the selection rounds, the institute may publish a category-wise merit list. Students who make it to the merit list become eligible for admission.STEP 4: DMI Admission ConfirmationThe selected candidates can further confirm their seats by paying the course admission fee.

courses_data.name: DMI Patna PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The DMI PGDM registration process has begun. Interested candidates can visit the official website of DMI Patna to apply for the course. Candidates with a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC) from a University or Institute recognised by UGC or AICTE are eligible to apply for the DMI PGDM admission 2025. The candidates also need a valid score card of CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT. Find below the key highlights of DMI PGDM Admissions 2025:

faqs.question: Does DMI Patna conducts GDPI round for PGDM admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, DMI Patna conducts a Group excercise round and a personal interview round after shortlisted candidates on the basis of merit secured in the national level entrance exam.The final admisson offers are made on the basis of following components:ComponentWeightageCAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT35%Group Exercise10%Assessment of Writing Skills5%Personal Interview30%Academic Performance (10+2) and Grduation10%Sports, extra curricular activities, Academic Diversities and Gender Diversity10%

faqs.question: What is the minimum DMI Patna PGDM eligibility?
faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility to apply for DMI MBA course is that the candidate must have completed their bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% of aggregate (45% for reserved category candidates) from a University or Institute recognised by UGC or AICTE. The candidate need to have a valid score card of CAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ CMAT/ MAT as well.

faqs.question: What is the process of admission at DMI Patna?
faqs.answer: The step-by-step DMI admission process is as follows:STEP 1: DMI Application Process 2025Eligible candidates can fill out the DMI Patna application form through its official website. The application form filling process involves registration, application form filling, document upload, application fee payment, and applicaton submission. Candidates shall ensure that they submit their application on or before the prescribed due date.STEP 2: Selection ProcessCandidates are shortlisted for admission based on merit in the CAT 2023/XAT 2025/GMAT/CMAT 2025/MAT and academic merit. These shortlisted candidates have to take the GDPI round. For final selection, multiple factors are taken into consideration.STEP 3: DMI Final Merit ListIn the next step, a category-wise merit list is published by the institute.STEP 4: DMI Admission ConfirmationThe merit list candidates can further confirm their seats by paying the course admission fee.

faqs.question: What all courses are offered at DMI Patna?
faqs.answer: DMI Patna offers Post garduate Diploma in Management (Development Managemet) course. The DMI PGDM is a residential, two-year course offered in a full-time, regular mode. Admission to the DMI MBA course is strictly entrance-based. The candidates with a valid CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT scores are eligible to apply for the course. The DMI applications for admission to the MBA in Development Management course begins in the month of November every year.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for DMI Patna admissions?
faqs.answer: Development Management Institute accept national-level exams for course admissions. Candidates are selected based on merit in the exam. The accepted entrance exams for DMI admissions are:CATXATGMATCMATMAT

faqs.answer: Follow the steps given below to apply for admission to various courses at Development Management Institute:Step 1:Visit the official website of the college.Step 2:Select the course and pay the application fee.Step 3:Fill out the application form.Step 4:Submit the form with relevant information.

college_info.college_name: DMI Patna Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee charged by DMI Patna for its PGDM course is INR 5.60 Lacs for 2 years. Apart from the total tuition fees, the institute also charges such as different kinds of service fees and other annual charges. The fee structure of DMI Patna PGDM is mentioned below:
Therefore, the DMI PGDM total fee is INR 6 lakh.
The service charges include Computer and Internet Services, Library and Teaching Aid Unit and Books.
The other charges include Student activities fund and medical fund.

Yes, Development Management Institute offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. These scholarships are provided to eligible postgraduate students. A minimum tuition fee waiver of 50% is provided to the university toppers, who are passing out in any of the last three academic years. Apart from this, candidates can also avail educational loans from banks. The state government subsidized loan facility is also made available through the District Registration and Counseling Centre (DRCC). However, only the candidates whose domicile is Bihar are eligible to take the state government loan. The loan is given at an interest rate of 1% for female and Divyang candidates and 4% for male applicants.

hostel.description: The FBS MBA Program is a residential program. The Students will be given Non-Air conditioned single rooms with a shared bathroom. The cost of housing and meals must be covered by the student. The cost of the dorm and the meal plan is the responsibility of the student. FBS Campuses do have hostel facilities for only 30 students. However the FBS Administration will help the students find appropriate off campus housing close to the specific campus. In the city, monthly living costs range from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The SSBT College Jalgaon course fee ranges between INR 80,000 to 2,74,892.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
