description: SSBT College Jalgaon Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

SSBT College Jalgaon cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 263113 and 675934 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 263113, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 270370.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 263113.

Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 58.79 to 56.55 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 56.55, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 17.6, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 28.49. hostel_campus.college_name: SSBT College Jalgaon Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I'm at least motivated to get my degree done.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library. There is a very green, nature-friendly environment where students can study peacefully. The travel facility is provided by buses, which cost 10,000 per year, which I think is a bit costly.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in a good manner. All types of facilities are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all good. Good food, canteen, and medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied because the overall placement record has decreased.
reviews.review_text: College have all facilities like gym Indore sports, outdoor sports, canteens, and hostels. The hostels have a mess in them. The college has bus facilities and also have the fresh water drinking and canteen mess. The mess provides fresh food in the hostel. The Wi-Fi facility and freshwater facility and rooms are very clear.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi in canteen, with affordable prices for students on various dishes. Library is best, big and all books are easily available with a variety of books. Sports are very important in any sector and here also they are given priority, like basketball, cricket, tennis, etc. Digital boards are also available in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Details About SSBT's College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The hostel facility is also awesome. The college is very good for the engineering course, better than other colleges in Jalgaon. The faculty in college is awesome, helpful, and knowledgeable, and they assist with placements.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in North Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but it faces a large water shortage, and the management is not very supportive. Classrooms have projectors, fans, boards, benches, etc. Internet is available in the computer lab and library. Library cards are given at the time of admission. The lift is not available for students; only teachers can use it. The hostel is near to the college, but its food is not great; it is just average. The sports field has basic medical emergency kits.

reviews.review_heading: Should you take admission in SSBT?
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are average. Wi-Fi is available, but the connection is poor. The library is too good, with maximum seating capacity, and books are easily available regarding the respective course. The mess and canteen are average, and the rate of food is low.

reviews.review_heading: Ask for a decent college?
reviews.review_text: Infra is very nice, and the hostel is also well managed. The library is well-equipped with technology. The library is very much designed for the students to enjoy, not like it's very shabby or has a lot of spacing and books. I am saying all the books are there, and the e-lab, in which computers and stuff are, is very helpful to students who don't have laptops.

reviews.review_heading: Some faculty members are very good. The package is below average. Infrastructure and labs are nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good It has a huge lawn and more than 15 computer labs. With high-end PC's, campus also has Wi-Fi but the speed is not good. It has a digital display in every room. There are a total of 4 canteens on campus: 2 are official and 2 are illegal. The food quality is below average; otherwise, you can go elsewhere for better options. There are many stores outside of college.

reviews.review_heading: Not dissatisfied by the faculty but not satisfied. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In this college the campus is of 25 acres with more tha 3 4 buildings and two lawns and canteens to hill out and the whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a filtered water in whole campus and the labs are well maintained. The classrooms are really good and have projectors in every class. I don't have that experience of hostel and mess but the food of mess is like average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SSBT’s College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has labs. The library is excellent. Our college has computer labs. It has more than 20 computers. Our college has a workshop lab. There are many labs. The hostel facilities are not much good. The canteen is not much good. They should be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Modern college in our age.
reviews.review_text: My college is our best campus and best facility are there. The campus will be Wi-Fi is sppedly network. Many computer labs are there. And classrooms will be digital and modern. Classrooms are fully cameras are there. College are big library in college.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the region with very well and equipped facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very impressive and sustainable for education. There are various facilities like well-equipped labs with the latest technology and the whole campus was equipped with the Wi-Fi internet connectivity. Every classroom has projectors for 3d simulation and learning. Hostel was very nice infact I was also living in hostel the facilities are very good with good hygiene. There is all kind of sports games were organised by hostel committee for student to showcase the...

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with faculty members but placements were very good in 2022.
reviews.review_text: All the department courses are available. We have separate labs and Wi-Fi in departments. There are digital classrooms In the college. We have 2 canteens and there is a separate ground for all sports. All the equipment of sports is available. Many players from this college are gold medalists.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides all facilities like hostels, a canteen, Wi-Fi, and a library. Our classrooms are good. They have good sitting arrangements. We have a sports ground where students can play volleyball, basketball, etc. The food served in the hostel is good.

admission_process.title: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saroj Institute of Technology and Managementadmission 2025is open for various courses. SITM offers BTech, BPharma, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. The selection criteria are merit or entrance-based. To get admitted to Saroj Institute of Technology and Management, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementis conducted online. Read the article to know more about theSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementcourse admission2025.

SITM Lucknow admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based. The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutSITM Lucknow course admissions2025:
Particulars
SITM Lucknow Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

SITM course admissionis completely merit-based & Entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Candidates looking for course admission must complete Class 12 in one attempt. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theSaroj Institute of Technology and Management courses:
CUET/UPTACcounselling
Merit-based/*CUET-PG
Merit0-based

Saroj Institute of Technology and Management admissionsare a mix of entrance and merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management is as follows:
STEP 1: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://seglko.org/. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, CUET, etc for admission to the BTech, BPharma among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSaroj Institute of Technology and Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

review_content.Placements: Phonics Group of Institutions is a college under Shri Dev Suman University which helps the students to enhance their skills and knowledge for their better future. The placement cell of this college helps the students to get a good package as their perfect job. 68% of students were placed in many famous companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has attractive infrastructure like libraries with updated books, Wi-Fi facility, and properly well-furnished laboratories and classrooms. Our college has good facilities for hostel rooms, food, cleaning, etc. Sports and games are organized by the college for the students to maintain their physical health.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm very satisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students got placed in my course. The average package for my course is 7 LPA, with companies like Rubico, Paytm, ISVR, and many more recruiting. 70% of students got internships in my course, and industrial visits are also conducted for technical students.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has fully furnished classrooms, fully equipped computer labs, and a very well-organized library with books of all varieties. The campus has free Wi-Fi and CCTV security available to ensure safety, along with very well-qualified faculty to provide knowledge.

faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions offers Degree and Diploma courses including 28 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Phonics Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Sc. specializations in Computer Science, Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Fisheries Science, Physics, Chemistry, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Are there any specializations offered by Phonics Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. overview_faqs.question: Why choose Phonics Group of Institutions?
overview_faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions (PGI) was established in 2009 and is located in Haridwar, Uttarakhand. Phonics Group of Institution courses are mainly offered to students in streams such as Engineering, Business Management, Commerce, Science, Computer Applications, Journalism, Hotel Management, etc. It is recognised by the UGC and offers AICTE-approved courses to students in full-time mode. Apart from this, the college also offers an excellent infrastructure to students.

overview_faqs.question: Is Phonics Group of Institutions worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Phonics Group of Institutions are B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Sc., BBA, M.Sc., BCA, B.Com, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Phonics Group of Institutions has a rating of 4 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.2, 3.6, 4.1 and 4.2 as per reviews by students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of Phonics University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees for courses differ from course to course. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Phonics University fee structure for some of the top courses is given in the following table:CoursesTotal tuition FeesBTechINR 1.1 lakh - INR 1.2 lakhMScINR 68,000BScINR 32,000 - INR 1.2 lakhBCAINR 82,000MBAINR 1.1 lakh - 1.2 lakhBEdINR 55,000BBAINR 72,000 - INR 82,000BComINR 32,000DPharmaINR 82,000

review_summary.college_name: Phonics University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Thanking Phonics to make my future brighter. Satisfied by all the facilities provided.

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed. The highest package offered by the college is 18 LPA whereas the minimum package offered is 2.4 LPA. Almost all the students got internships from my batch in several companies like HCL, TCS, Flipkart, Wipro, etc. Top roles offered in my course are software developer, ML engineer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have computer labs, library, seminar hall, and projectors in classes which makes learning easier. Being a hosteler I would appreciate mess food and workers there who maintain proper hygiene and provide food much better than the other college hostels. Also, our canteen has various food options which are 24/7 available. Various sports and games are available like basketball, football, cricket, badminton, etc., in which anyone can participate their choice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and provides good facilities .

content.Placements: Phonics Group of College is under Shri Dev Suman University. 65% of students in my college got placements. The average package for my college is 7 LPA with companies like Paytm and ISVR. Our college focuses on bridging the gap between academics and industry. Industrial visits are also conducted by our college. Students enjoy remarkable placement opportunities right after the graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides top-tier infrastructure and a fostering environment. The campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides a library with books, laboratories, and good classrooms that enhance the learning experience. Our college has fully equipped computer labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is a great platform to learn and enhance your skills and qualities for a better future.

content.Placements: Phonics Group of Institutions is a college under Shri Dev Suman University which helps the students to enhance their skills and knowledge for their better future. The placement cell of this college helps the students to get a good package as their perfect job. 68% of students were placed in many famous companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has attractive infrastructure like libraries with updated books, Wi-Fi facility, and properly well-furnished laboratories and classrooms. Our college has good facilities for hostel rooms, food, cleaning, etc. Sports and games are organized by the college for the students to maintain their physical health.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm very satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: 65% of students got placed in my course. The average package for my course is 7 LPA, with companies like Rubico, Paytm, ISVR, and many more recruiting. 70% of students got internships in my course, and industrial visits are also conducted for technical students.
content.Infrastructure: My college has fully furnished classrooms, fully equipped computer labs, and a very well-organized library with books of all varieties. The campus has free Wi-Fi and CCTV security available to ensure safety, along with very well-qualified faculty to provide knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college with the best campus.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are getting placements in my college with good companies and good wages. The highest package is around 100,000. Top national and international companies come to provide placements; last time, a company from Canada placed 2-3 students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi is available in the libraries, which are well-furnished, and the classrooms are also nice. The labs have a good interior and provide efficient facilities. The canteen food is fresh and hygienic, and the sports ground is huge.

admission_overview.college_name: Phonics University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Phonics University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Phonics University admission 2025is currently ongoing on the official website of the university. The university offers various courses, such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MTech and many others under ten schools, including the School of Computer Science, Pharmacy, Nursing, and others. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Candidates get entrance-based admission to all UG, PG and diploma courses.Phonics Universitycarries out the application process in online mode. Read the following article to get a detailed breakdown ofPhonics Universityadmission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Phonics University admissionto all the courses is merit-based and entrance-based. The university offers an online mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Candidates seeking admission can check out the table below for updated information related to thePhonics Universityeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Phonics University admission process 2025has begun for all courses. The university offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. Candidates are required to fulfil the admission process of the university for seat allotment. Check below the Phonics University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates searching for admission to Phonics University in any course are required to apply on the official website of the same.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Phonics University admission is entrance-based for all the courses. The university accepts various university, national-level and state-level entrance exam scores for admission to its UG, PG and diploma courses. Additionally, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e., pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses, pass UG degree for admission to PG courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

The university releases the merit list based on the scores in qualifying entrance exams. Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to submit a certain amount of thePhonics University feeto lock their seats.

faqs.question: How can I get into Phonics Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates who have completed Graduation/Post graduation with 50% marks in any stream (that is, Arts, Science or Commerce) from any recognised Board / Council / University are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any stream Math/Biology/Arts/Commerce with above mentioned marks to be eligible.MBA/PGDMStudents of reserved category needs to score 45% marks in graduation.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.

placement_data.title: Phonics University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement season 2024 for the Phonics University, Roorkee has come to an end. In all, more than 750 placement offers were made to students from various courses such as BTech, MBA, BCom, etc. The highest package reached INR 26 LPA during Phonics University placements. While the average package stood at INR 4.5 LPA. The placement rate achieved during the placement season was 80% . Over 700 companies are participating in the Phonics University, Roorkee placements drive and top recruiters such as Genpact, Infosys, Accenture, Cognizant , etc have made it to the list.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides decent infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were not up to mark. Wi-Fi is not available for all the students. Classrooms were not very clean. Food quality available in the canteen was decent. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience was not good because there are no placements in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has all good facilities and infrastructure such as Wi-Fi, labs, library etc. The quality of the hostel is the best, and the food is not much good. The medical, sports and games facilities are good. The quality of facilities is good, but the placements are not good. The management lies about it.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are helpful, and the environment of the college is very positive.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college. The library is well organised, and all the books are available. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms cleanliness is the main objective of college. Wi-Fi facility is also available for students. Hostel food is very good, and medical facilities are also available. Cricket ground basketball court, football ground are also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities, faculty and scholarships provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established in 2000. It is a good place to build your future. Sports facilities are awesome, and students do participate. The library has many books. Smart classes are available. Medical facilities are very important, and so the doctor visits our college.
